title: Volunteer Opportunities * Foster Children - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Volunteering & Donating > Volunteer Opportunities * Foster Children 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Autism Spectrum Disorder Child Abuse Issues Disaster/Emergency Issues Domestic Violence Issues Foster Children Homelessness Issues Seasonal Workers Veterans Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF OREGON CASA NETWORK COURT APPOINTED SPECIAL ADVOCATES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Recruits, trains, and supports citizen volunteers who serve as Court Appointed Special Advocates (CASA). CASA volunteers advocate in court and in the community for the rights of children who have been abused and neglected, and are under the protection of the juvenile courts. Eligibility: Volunteers need to meet the following minimum qualifications: -Age 21 and older -Pass criminal background checks -Ability to complete and maintain training -Ability to commit to the program for at least 2 years Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30pm-5pm Email (971) 301-2873 Visit Website More Details No Mapping Information Available
